headlines.title: TO SUPPLY NORTH SIDE WITH MORE NEW HOMES
GROUP - OF - KATY - SECTION - FOREMEN
headlines.fullText: This photograph shows a group of Missouri, Kansas & Texas section foremen, who recently attended a conference at Denison. The meeting was called by Superintendent A. S. Johnson of the Denison division. The foremen were thoroughly instructed regarding their duties and official reports. The conference closed with a dinner given by Johnson.
